mapper.sql: d.id::text, d.tournament_id::text, d.category_id::text, tc.name AS category_name, tc.type AS category_type, d.name, d.format, d.status, d.total_rounds, d.player_ids::text AS player_ids, d.team_ids::text AS team_ids, d.created_at, d.updated_at

ds.id::text, ds.draw_id::text, ds.round, ds.position, ds.player_id::text, p.name AS player_name, t.name AS player_team_name, ds.pair_id::text, pa.name AS pair_player_a_name, pb.name AS pair_player_b_name, ds.seed_number, ds.is_bye, ds.team_id::text, tm.name AS team_name, ds.encounter_id::text, ds.match_id::text, m.status AS match_status, m.result_type AS match_result_type, m.sets::text AS match_sets, m.court_id::text AS match_court_id, c.name AS match_court_name, m."order" AS match_order, ds.winner, ds.created_at

LEFT JOIN players p ON ds.player_id = p.id LEFT JOIN teams t ON p.team_id = t.id LEFT JOIN pairs pr ON ds.pair_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN players pa ON pr.player_a_id = pa.id LEFT JOIN players pb ON pr.player_b_id = pb.id LEFT JOIN teams tm ON ds.team_id = tm.id LEFT JOIN matches m ON ds.match_id = m.id LEFT JOIN courts c ON m.court_id = c.id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM draws d LEFT JOIN tournament_categories tc ON d.category_id = tc.id WHERE d.tournament_id = #{tournamentId}::uuid ORDER BY d.created_at ASC
SELECT FROM draws d LEFT JOIN tournament_categories tc ON d.category_id = tc.id WHERE d.id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO draws (id, tournament_id, category_id, name, format, status, total_rounds, player_ids, team_ids, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{tournamentId}::uuid, #{categoryId}::uuid, #{name}, #{format}, #{status}, #{totalRounds},
#{playerIds}::jsonb '[]'::jsonb ,
#{teamIds}::jsonb '[]'::jsonb , #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE draws SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM draw_slots ds
WHERE ds.draw_id = #{drawId}::uuid ORDER BY ds.round ASC, ds.position ASC

SELECT FROM draw_slots ds
WHERE ds.id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO draw_slots (id, draw_id, round, position, player_id, pair_id, seed_number, is_bye, match_id, created_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{drawId}::uuid, #{round}, #{position},
#{playerId}::uuid NULL ,
#{pairId}::uuid NULL , #{seedNumber}, #{bye},
#{matchId}::uuid NULL , #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE draw_slots SET player_id = #{playerId}::uuid NULL , seed_number = #{seedNumber}, is_bye = #{bye}, team_id = NULL, encounter_id = NULL WHERE id = #{id}::uuid

UPDATE draw_slots SET match_id = #{matchId}::uuid NULL
WHERE id = #{id}::uuid

UPDATE draw_slots SET player_id = #{playerId}::uuid NULL
WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE draw_slots SET winner = #{winner} WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE draw_slots SET player_id = NULL, team_id = NULL, is_bye = FALSE WHERE draw_id = #{drawId}::uuid AND seed_number IS NULL AND match_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tournament_categories WHERE id = #{categoryId}::uuid AND tournament_id = #{tournamentId}::uuid )
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tournament_pairs WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId}::uuid AND pair_id = #{pairId}::uuid )
mapper.update: UPDATE draw_slots SET pair_id = #{pairId}::uuid NULL , seed_number = #{seedNumber} WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tournament_players WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId}::uuid AND player_id = #{playerId}::uuid )

SELECT FROM draw_slots ds
WHERE ds.draw_id = #{drawId}::uuid AND ds.round = #{round} ORDER BY ds.position ASC

SELECT FROM draw_slots ds
WHERE ds.draw_id = #{drawId}::uuid AND ds.round = #{round} - 1 ORDER BY ds.position ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE matches SET "order" = "order" + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE court_id = #{courtId}::uuid AND "order" >= #{order}
mapper.select: SELECT tournament_id::text FROM draws WHERE id = #{drawId}::uuid
SELECT tournament_id::text FROM matches WHERE id = #{matchId}::uuid

SELECT FROM draws d LEFT JOIN tournament_categories tc ON d.category_id = tc.id WHERE d.tournament_id = #{tournamentId}::uuid AND d.category_id = #{categoryId}::uuid AND d.format = 'round_robin' ORDER BY d.created_at ASC

SELECT p.id::text AS id, p.name AS name, t.name AS team FROM players p LEFT JOIN teams t ON p.team_id = t.id WHERE p.id IN
#{id}::uuid

SELECT pr.id::text AS id, pa.name AS playerAName, pb.name AS playerBName FROM pairs pr JOIN players pa ON pr.player_a_id = pa.id JOIN players pb ON pr.player_b_id = pb.id WHERE pr.id IN
#{id}::uuid
SELECT DISTINCT m.id::text FROM draw_slots ds JOIN matches m ON ds.match_id = m.id WHERE ds.draw_id = #{drawId}::uuid AND ds.match_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT d.id::text AS id, d.name AS name, sa.round AS round, d.total_rounds AS totalRounds, r1a.position AS sideAR1Position, r1b.position AS sideBR1Position, r1a.seed_number AS sideASeedNumber, r1b.seed_number AS sideBSeedNumber FROM draw_slots sa JOIN draws d ON sa.draw_id = d.id JOIN draw_slots sb ON sb.match_id = sa.match_id AND sb.draw_id = sa.draw_id AND sb.position > sa.position LEFT JOIN draw_slots r1a ON r1a.draw_id = sa.draw_id AND r1a.round = 1 AND ( (sa.player_id IS NOT NULL AND r1a.player_id = sa.player_id) OR (sa.pair_id IS NOT NULL AND r1a.pair_id = sa.pair_id) ) LEFT JOIN draw_slots r1b ON r1b.draw_id = sb.draw_id AND r1b.round = 1 AND ( (sb.player_id IS NOT NULL AND r1b.player_id = sb.player_id) OR (sb.pair_id IS NOT NULL AND r1b.pair_id = sb.pair_id) ) WHERE sa.match_id = #{matchId}::uuid AND sa.position < sb.position
UNION ALL
SELECT d.id::text AS id, d.name AS name, 0 AS round, 0 AS totalRounds, NULL AS sideAR1Position, NULL AS sideBR1Position, NULL AS sideASeedNumber, NULL AS sideBSeedNumber FROM matches m JOIN draws d ON m.draw_id = d.id WHERE m.id = #{matchId}::uuid AND d.format = 'round_robin' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM draw_slots ds WHERE ds.match_id = #{matchId}::uuid )
UNION ALL
SELECT d.id::text AS id, d.name AS name, 0 AS round, 0 AS totalRounds, NULL AS sideAR1Position, NULL AS sideBR1Position, NULL AS sideASeedNumber, NULL AS sideBSeedNumber FROM matches m JOIN team_encounters te ON m.team_encounter_id = te.id JOIN draws d ON te.draw_id = d.id WHERE m.id = #{matchId}::uuid AND te.draw_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE draw_slots SET team_id = #{teamId}::uuid, is_bye = FALSE WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE draw_slots SET team_id = #{teamId}::uuid, seed_number = #{seedNumber}, is_bye = FALSE WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE draw_slots SET encounter_id = #{encounterId}::uuid WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM draws d WHERE d.tournament_id = #{tournamentId}::uuid AND d.category_id = #{categoryId}::uuid AND d.team_ids::jsonb @> ('"' || #{teamId} || '"')::jsonb )
mapper.update: UPDATE tournament_categories SET rubbers = #{rubbers}::jsonb WHERE id = #{categoryId}::uuid
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM draw_slots ds
WHERE ds.encounter_id = #{encounterId}::uuid

SELECT FROM draw_slots ds
WHERE ds.draw_id IN
#{id}::uuid
ORDER BY ds.draw_id, ds.round ASC, ds.position ASC
